results.title: International Summer Festival ends on a high note in Shimla
results.description: Shafaqna India: A large crowd gathers at the International Summer Festival. Punjabi singers Jassi Gill and Babal Rai perform at the International Summer Festival. Youth dance and celebrate on the last day of the International Summer Festival. People enjoy a performance by Punjabi singer Babal Rai.
